en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 59

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 59
Does the implosion of LUNA mean crypto / web3 / NFTs are dead?

In short, no. It’s an isolated product that doesn’t reflect much in terms of the core Ethereum based ecosystem. However, people’s live have been heavily affected. To follow from Vitalik’s tweet, the right move after this event is not to pull the arbitrary and hamfisted regulation card that only serves beltway and wall street insiders. Instead it’s about doubling down on better tools, resources, awareness and education for which projects are doing it right (i.e. real web3 rooted in transparent self sovereign networks) and which projects have incendiary red flags.
What’s upcoming for the ecosystem — new roadmap?

The full roadmap ahead was released yesterday with a clear action plan detailing out DIGITALAX’s core priorities and focus. This complements every milestone that we have accomplished so far, and also the recent whitepaper V3.

Some community members have reached out and asked why $MONA wasn’t more explicitly detailed out in the paper for how it fits into everything to come. To some extent, that’s because from our perspective it is already clear that $MONA is the essential token mechanism which powers the entire ecosystem, but also, this roadmap and the V3 whitepaper are intentionally meant to be much lighter reads than some of the in depth publications we’ve made before. You’ll see this aesthetic also reflected in the soon to be released new homepage.
However, we would also say, stay on the lookout because more can be more too. And there is much more to come.

First impressions of Miladys definitely signaled that it came from and was influenced by some of the weirder parts of web culture. Not going to pretend that any of us fully got it. But, rather, put it on the shelf as one of those things to look more closely at when the time came. Well, it looks like the time has come. And that time is filled with double take WTFs.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
